CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Set For Trial On Jul-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-24-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-517855 WITH CASE CGC-14-538848
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ricardo A. Martinez, Esq. of McNamara Law Firm, Tel. 925.939.5330, for defendant and moving party;
Gerard Mannion, Esq. of Mannion & Lowe, Tel. 415.733.1052, for Plaintiff David Cheung in Case CGC-12-517855,
Kristine Velarde, Esq. of Cesari Werner & Moriarty, Tel. 650.991.5126 ext.26, for CRDN-Greater Bay Area.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JON K. TAKATA CORPORATION DBA RESTORATION MANAGEMENT COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-517855 WITH CASE CGC-14-538848 is denied. The prejudice that would be suffered by Plaintiff as a result of another trial continuance in the original action outweighs the showing of enhanced efficiencies made by Defendant. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
